business_ideas.idea: Young competitive gamer summit: connect top gamers/mathelete talent with startup opportunities
Peachy Babies: TikTok slime business doing tens of millions in revenue annually
TikTok Shop selling: highly lucrative e-commerce game for video content creators
Marketplace events like HLTH: three-day buyer-seller marketplace with paid meetings
Money20/20 and ShopTalk: trade shows generating 100M+ revenue at scale

predictions.text: Competitive gamers/mathelete winners transfer skills to business successfully
TikTok Shop content drives direct e-commerce sales at tens of millions scale
Only top-tier trade shows survive; fourth-tier events die without critical mass
